MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Avalon Bay Comminities is present. Represented by Lisa Quigley.
Attorney, Jane Creason, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants, Cynthia Girrbach and DK Sappington, are present.
Attorney, Alyssa Parsons , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Norman Nayfach, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of AUG-23-2010 is vacated.
